title: Repairable Disc 11
description: This mod allows you to repair the elusive Music Disc 11...
body:
# Repairable Disc 11:

**Music Disc Eleven:**
If you surround a Disc 11 with 8 Diamonds in a Crafting Table, you will get a new music disc titled Disc Eleven.

It looks like any normal music disc, but with a Diamond-blue center.

If you play it in a Jukebox, you will be able to listen to the non-damaged version of Disc 11 titled “Eleven”, which you can listen to [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=l9nULbHnzfk&ab_channel=C418-Topic).

The music disc is 1640 ticks long, or 1 minute and 11 seconds.

If a Comparator is next to a Jukebox playing this disc, it will output a Redstone signal strength of 11.

# Other:

**Mod Packs:**

If you want to use this mod in a Mod Pack, you can, as long as you give me credit.
